calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2004 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2004 Continued To Aug-30-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-13-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S.Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia Van Steenberge,
David J. Cook, Esq. for Plaintiff: State Bar of California.
Plaintiff's witness: Tracey mcCormick, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant: Jon Eric Hollmann, the sum of $50,000.00 in principal.
Judgment signed in open court.
